passages.text: It's time to wake up~ [[1.2]]
passages.cleanText: It's time to wake up~
AH-

passages.text: Woah- what a weird dream. 4th night in a row, whew. [[1.4]]
passages.cleanText: Woah- what a weird dream. 4th night in a row, whew.

passages.text:
Maybe I should get a check up from Dr. Muffins... 
[["I'll call him now..." -> 1.5]] 
[["Well he might be busy... maybe I'll ask later." -> 1.5]]

links.linkText: "Well he might be busy... maybe I'll ask later."
links.original: [["Well he might be busy... maybe I'll ask later." -> 1.5]]

passages.cleanText: Maybe I should get a check up from Dr. Muffins...

passages.text: You are Marty R, Honey Haven's mailmouse. Every morning you brush your teeth, pack your satchel, and enjoy a filling breakfast. Today's is a simple stew with boiled potatoes, carrots, and sunflower seeds. The chilly autumn months are rapidly approaching... [[1.7]]
passages.cleanText: You are Marty R, Honey Haven's mailmouse. Every morning you brush your teeth, pack your satchel, and enjoy a filling breakfast. Today's is a simple stew with boiled potatoes, carrots, and sunflower seeds. The chilly autumn months are rapidly approaching...

passages.text:
AH- A- ACHOOOOO! 

[["Oh wow. I better put on a coat before heading out!" ->1.8]]
[["This weather's got nothing on me!" ->1.8]]

links.linkText: "Oh wow. I better put on a coat before heading out!"
links.original: [["Oh wow. I better put on a coat before heading out!" ->1.8]]

passages.cleanText: AH- A- ACHOOOOO!

passages.text: 7:52!! I'll be late at this rate! [[1.6]]
passages.cleanText: 7:52!! I'll be late at this rate!

passages.text: You head out to deliver mail across Honey Haven. [[1.8 MAIN]]
passages.cleanText: You head out to deliver mail across Honey Haven.

passages.name: 1.9 pepper lane
passages.text: You head northwest and reach Pepper Lane, a street bustling with young children playing on unkempt, wild front lawns and elderly residents in rocking chairs on white porches. [[1.10 pepper]]
passages.cleanText: You head northwest and reach Pepper Lane, a street bustling with young children playing on unkempt, wild front lawns and elderly residents in rocking chairs on white porches.

passages.name: 1.9 casserole avenue
passages.text: You turn left onto Casserole Avenue, a beautiful street full of dewey green vegetables. [[1.10]]
passages.cleanText: You turn left onto Casserole Avenue, a beautiful street full of dewey green vegetables.

passages.name: 1.9 truffle corner
passages.text: You go eastward until you hit Truffle Corner, a small crevice where two streets meet. Only one resident lives in the tiny, rundown, yet cozy shaft. [[1.10 truffle corner]]
passages.cleanText: You go eastward until you hit Truffle Corner, a small crevice where two streets meet. Only one resident lives in the tiny, rundown, yet cozy shaft.

passages.name: 1.11a casserole
passages.text:
BOO!!!
[[1.12a casserole]]
passages.cleanText: BOO!!!

passages.name: 1.11b casserole
passages.text: Hey Ms. Buttons! Already at it so early, I see. [[1.12b casserole]]
passages.cleanText: Hey Ms. Buttons! Already at it so early, I see.

passages.text:
The first home you see has a wooden enclosure sprouting plump carrots. Ms. Buttons, the restaurant owner of Bunalicious, lives here. She's picking the carrots in her garden when you approach. 
[[Jumpscare Ms. Buttons -> 1.11a casserole]]
[[Call for her attention -> 1.11b casserole]]
passages.cleanText: The first home you see has a wooden enclosure sprouting plump carrots. Ms. Buttons, the restaurant owner of Bunalicious, lives here. She's picking the carrots in her garden when you approach.

passages.name: 1.12a casserole
passages.text: AHHHGJDLFpfhuff.. *huff* [[1.12a.1 casserole]]
passages.cleanText: AHHHGJDLFpfhuff.. *huff*

passages.name: 1.12b casserole
passages.text: Ah, hello Marty! Well, an old bunny like me needs to get her work done early. [[1.14 casserole]]
passages.cleanText: Ah, hello Marty! Well, an old bunny like me needs to get her work done early.

passages.name: 1.13a casserole
passages.text: Always trying to scare an old bunny. [[1.14 casserole]]
passages.cleanText: Always trying to scare an old bunny.

passages.name: 1.14 casserole
passages.text: Haha, you're no old bunny yet. When you get to Mrs. Tofu's age, then you can start talking. [[1.15 casserole]]
passages.cleanText: Haha, you're no old bunny yet. When you get to Mrs. Tofu's age, then you can start talking.

passages.name: 1.15 casserole
passages.text: You sure know how to make a bunny blush, you lil charmer. Do you have some mail for me? [[1.16 casserole]]
passages.cleanText: You sure know how to make a bunny blush, you lil charmer. Do you have some mail for me?

passages.name: 1.16 casserole
passages.text: Sure do. I guess Bunalicious is booming, 'cause you have a lottt of interest. [[1.17 casserole]]
passages.cleanText: Sure do. I guess Bunalicious is booming, 'cause you have a lottt of interest.

passages.name: 1.17 casserole
passages.text: Thanks sweetie pie! [[1.18 casserole]]
passages.cleanText: Thanks sweetie pie!

passages.name: 1.18 casserole
passages.text: You bid Ms. Buttons farewell and move onto the next home, a hollowed out treehouse. This is the home of Peaches, a vibrant, young possum mother. [[1.19 casserole]]
passages.cleanText: You bid Ms. Buttons farewell and move onto the next home, a hollowed out treehouse. This is the home of Peaches, a vibrant, young possum mother.

passages.name: 1.19 casserole
passages.text: Hi Peaches! How ya doing?  [[1.20 casserole]]
passages.cleanText: Hi Peaches! How ya doing?

passages.name: 1.20 casserole
passages.text: Just wonderful, Marty. I hope you are doing wonderful, too. I just got back from the most amazing vacation at the Rainforest Resort. [[1.21 casserole]]
passages.cleanText: Just wonderful, Marty. I hope you are doing wonderful, too. I just got back from the most amazing vacation at the Rainforest Resort.

passages.name: 1.21 casserole
passages.text: Wow! That's an expensive place. [[1.22 casserole]]
passages.cleanText: Wow! That's an expensive place.

passages.name: 1.22 casserole
passages.text: Yes, it was a nice.. gift. From a lil friend of mine. [[1.23 casserole]]
passages.cleanText: Yes, it was a nice.. gift. From a lil friend of mine.

passages.name: 1.23 casserole
passages.text: What a kind (and rich) friend you have! [[1.24 casserole]]
passages.cleanText: What a kind (and rich) friend you have!

passages.name: 1.24 casserole
passages.text: Oh my GOAT, I haven't met your babies yet. Can I say hi? [[1.25 casserole]]
passages.cleanText: Oh my GOAT, I haven't met your babies yet. Can I say hi?

passages.name: 1.25 casserole
passages.text: Aw sorry, they're just a little shy. Maybe next time! Thank you for the mail Marty. [[1.26 casserole]]
passages.cleanText: Aw sorry, they're just a little shy. Maybe next time! Thank you for the mail Marty.

passages.name: 1.26 casserole
passages.text: You move to the end of Casserole Avenue where your best friend, Matthew, lives. He's waiting for you when you arrive. [[1.27 casserole]]
passages.cleanText: You move to the end of Casserole Avenue where your best friend, Matthew, lives. He's waiting for you when you arrive.

passages.name: 1.27 casserole
passages.text: Took you long enough. This mouse might as well be a snail. [[1.28 casserole]]
passages.cleanText: Took you long enough. This mouse might as well be a snail.

passages.name: 1.28 casserole
passages.text: Bah ba baaa. Whatever, Matthew. Here's your mail. [[1.29 casserole]]
passages.cleanText: Bah ba baaa. Whatever, Matthew. Here's your mail.

passages.name: 1.29 casserole
passages.text: You doing alright? You look a lil tired. [[1.30 casserole]]
passages.cleanText: You doing alright? You look a lil tired.

passages.name: 1.30 casserole
passages.text: It's nothing big, I just haven't been sleeping well. [[1.31 casserole]]
passages.cleanText: It's nothing big, I just haven't been sleeping well.

passages.name: 1.31 casserole
passages.text:
Aw rats, that stinks! 
[["What did you just call me!?" -> 1.32 casserole]]
[["That's me!" -> 1.32 casserole]]

links.original: [["What did you just call me!?" -> 1.32 casserole]]

passages.cleanText: Aw rats, that stinks!

passages.name: 1.32 casserole
passages.text: Sooo. Who's the lady who keeps sending you mail? I keep having to stop by here everyday. [[1.33 casserole]]
passages.cleanText: Sooo. Who's the lady who keeps sending you mail? I keep having to stop by here everyday.

passages.name: 1.33 casserole
passages.text: Sigh, it's just my aunt Susan. She's constantly checking up on me. [[1.34 casserole]]
passages.cleanText: Sigh, it's just my aunt Susan. She's constantly checking up on me.

passages.name: 1.34 casserole
passages.text: Haha! Someone's still in grade school. [[1.35 casserole]]
passages.cleanText: Haha! Someone's still in grade school.

passages.name: 1.35 casserole
passages.text: I'll be on my way now! Knowing Aunt Susan, I'll be back tomorrow. [[1.36 casserole]]
passages.cleanText: I'll be on my way now! Knowing Aunt Susan, I'll be back tomorrow.

passages.name: 1.8 MAIN
passages.text:
Where to?
[[Pepper Lane -> 1.9 pepper lane]]
[[Casserole Avenue -> 1.9 casserole avenue]]
[[Truffle Corner -> 1.9 truffle corner]]
[[1.9 main]]
passages.cleanText: Where to?

passages.name: 1.10 truffle corner
passages.text: You knock on the door of the eerily silent home. The doorplate reads, "Jonathan F. Smith." [[1.11 truffle]]
passages.cleanText: You knock on the door of the eerily silent home. The doorplate reads, "Jonathan F. Smith."

passages.name: 1.11 truffle
passages.text: Hello? Mr. Smith? Are you home? [[1.11.5 truffle]]
passages.cleanText: Hello? Mr. Smith? Are you home?

passages.name: 1.12 truffle
passages.text: I guess not. Sigh, it's been a few years since I've seen Mr. Smith. [[1.13 truffle]]
passages.cleanText: I guess not. Sigh, it's been a few years since I've seen Mr. Smith.

passages.name: 1.13 truffle
passages.text: I wonder why he suddenly became so reclusive... Come to think of it, wasn't it also around this time two years ago? [[1.14 truffle]]
passages.cleanText: I wonder why he suddenly became so reclusive... Come to think of it, wasn't it also around this time two years ago?

passages.name: 1.14 truffle
passages.text: Ah- You're getting distracted, me! Gah! I better get on my way. I need to make it in time for Mayor Barnaby's speech tonight. [[1.15 truffle]]
passages.cleanText: Ah- You're getting distracted, me! Gah! I better get on my way. I need to make it in time for Mayor Barnaby's speech tonight.

passages.name: 1.15 truffle
passages.text: You put the letters for Jonathan F. Smith in his mailbox and head out. [[1.8 MAIN]]
passages.cleanText: You put the letters for Jonathan F. Smith in his mailbox and head out.

passages.name: 1.11.5 truffle
passages.text: [[1.12 truffle]] You hear soft sounds of tv and static from inside the home. There's some shifting, but no indications of footsteps or movements towards the door.
passages.cleanText: You hear soft sounds of tv and static from inside the home. There's some shifting, but no indications of footsteps or movements towards the door.

passages.name: 1.36 casserole
passages.text: You turn to leave Casserole Avenue. [[1.8 MAIN]]
passages.cleanText: You turn to leave Casserole Avenue.

passages.name: 1.10 pepper
passages.text: You approach the cozy home of Mrs. Tofu and Mr. Scotch, an elderly tortoise and sloth couple who, despite having no kids of their own, delight in having the company of such youthful, racous neighbors. [[1.11 pepper]]
passages.cleanText: You approach the cozy home of Mrs. Tofu and Mr. Scotch, an elderly tortoise and sloth couple who, despite having no kids of their own, delight in having the company of such youthful, racous neighbors.

passages.name: 1.11 pepper
passages.text: Mrs. Tofu! Mr. Scotch! Good morning! [[1.12 pepper]]
passages.cleanText: Mrs. Tofu! Mr. Scotch! Good morning!

passages.name: 1.12 pepper
passages.text: Why, good morning Marty! Jolly day, isn't it. [[1.13 pepper]]
passages.cleanText: Why, good morning Marty! Jolly day, isn't it.

passages.name: 1.13 pepper
passages.text: Haha, the air is starting to feel like a knife though. [[1.14 pepper]]
passages.cleanText: Haha, the air is starting to feel like a knife though.

passages.name: 1.14 pepper
passages.text: Here's your mail! [[1.15 pepper]]
passages.cleanText: Here's your mail!

passages.name: 1.15 pepper
passages.text: Thank you, Marty! It is always nice to see your face, my dear. [[1.16 pepper]]
passages.cleanText: Thank you, Marty! It is always nice to see your face, my dear.

passages.name: 1.16 pepper
passages.text: You bid farewell to Mrs. Tofu and Mr. Scotch, your favorite elderly residents in Honey Haven. [[1.17 pepper]]
passages.cleanText: You bid farewell to Mrs. Tofu and Mr. Scotch, your favorite elderly residents in Honey Haven.

passages.name: 1.17 pepper
passages.text: You approach the next house, where a little purple cat is leaning on the mailbox and smirking at you. [[1.18 pepper]]
passages.cleanText: You approach the next house, where a little purple cat is leaning on the mailbox and smirking at you.

passages.name: 1.18 pepper
passages.text: Mr. Marty, what's up with the scary monster behind you? [[1.19 pepper]]
passages.cleanText: Mr. Marty, what's up with the scary monster behind you?

passages.name: 1.19 pepper
passages.text: What? [[1.20 pepper]]
passages.cleanText: What?

passages.name: 1.20 pepper
passages.text: You heard me. It keeps following you for some reason. [[1.21 pepper]]
passages.cleanText: You heard me. It keeps following you for some reason.

passages.name: 1.21 pepper
passages.text: You turn around and see nothing there. You breathe a sigh of relief. [[1.22 pepper]]
passages.cleanText: You turn around and see nothing there. You breathe a sigh of relief.

passages.name: 1.22 pepper
passages.text: See Chester? Nothing there. [[1.23 pepper]]
passages.cleanText: See Chester? Nothing there.

passages.name: 1.23 pepper
passages.text: That's cuz you can't see him... but he's there. But I can. He really likes you- [[1.24 pepper]]
passages.cleanText: That's cuz you can't see him... but he's there. But I can. He really likes you-

passages.name: 1.24 pepper
passages.text: AH! [[1.25 pepper]]
passages.cleanText: AH!

passages.name: 1.25 pepper
passages.text: Ms. Mochi, Chester's mom, picks him up. [[1.26 pepper]]
passages.cleanText: Ms. Mochi, Chester's mom, picks him up.

passages.name: 1.26 pepper
passages.text: Oh my, I'm so sorry Marty. Chester likes playing with mice. [[1.27 pepper]]
passages.cleanText: Oh my, I'm so sorry Marty. Chester likes playing with mice.

passages.name: 1.27 pepper
passages.text: I'll make sure he doesn't misbehave again. [[1.28 pepper]]
passages.cleanText: I'll make sure he doesn't misbehave again.

passages.name: 1.28 pepper
passages.text: Thanks for the mail! [[1.29 pepper]]
passages.cleanText: Thanks for the mail!

passages.name: 1.30 pepper
passages.text: You shrug off the bristling feeling and knock on the door of the final house in the row, belonging to Mr. Schlawg and his son, Peanut. [[1.31 pepper]]
passages.cleanText: You shrug off the bristling feeling and knock on the door of the final house in the row, belonging to Mr. Schlawg and his son, Peanut.

passages.name: 1.29 pepper
passages.text: [[1.30 pepper]] That was weird...
passages.cleanText: That was weird...

passages.name: 1.31 pepper
passages.text: There's a note on the door. Let's see.. oh, they're at the doctors. [[1.32 pepper]]
passages.cleanText: There's a note on the door. Let's see.. oh, they're at the doctors.

passages.name: 1.32 pepper
passages.text: You leave their letters in the mailbox. [[1.33 pepper]]
passages.cleanText: You leave their letters in the mailbox.

passages.name: 1.33 pepper
passages.text: That reminds me, I have to see Dr. Muffins. [[1.34 pepper]]
passages.cleanText: That reminds me, I have to see Dr. Muffins.

passages.name: 1.34 pepper
passages.text: You leave Pepper Lane. [[1.8 MAIN]]
passages.cleanText: You leave Pepper Lane.

passages.name: 1.9 main
passages.text: You're off to Honeybee Center, the town square, when you see Ms. Buttons running up to you with a cradle of carrots. [[1.10 main]]
passages.cleanText: You're off to Honeybee Center, the town square, when you see Ms. Buttons running up to you with a cradle of carrots.

passages.name: 1.10 main
passages.text:
Marty! I just finished picking all my carrots and I need these at Bunalicious ASAP. Can you take them for me?
[["Yes, of course!" -> 1.11a main]]
[["I'm a little busy..." -> 1.11b main]]
passages.cleanText: Marty! I just finished picking all my carrots and I need these at Bunalicious ASAP. Can you take them for me?

passages.name: 1.11a main
passages.text: Thank you sweetie pie! I'll make sure you get some free carrot cake next time you stop by. [[1.12a main]]
passages.cleanText: Thank you sweetie pie! I'll make sure you get some free carrot cake next time you stop by.

passages.name: 1.11b main
passages.text: Well surely you can spare a few minutes for this old bunny! [[1.12b main]]
passages.cleanText: Well surely you can spare a few minutes for this old bunny!

passages.name: 1.12b main
passages.text: You're already on your way to Honeybee Center. Just take these with you! [[1.13b main]]
passages.cleanText: You're already on your way to Honeybee Center. Just take these with you!

passages.name: 1.13b main
passages.text: She hops off after thrusting the cradle of carrots into your arm, mumbling about how the younger generations are lazy and incapable. [[Deliver carrots and go to Honeybee Center -> 1.14 main]]

links.linkText: Deliver carrots and go to Honeybee Center
links.original: [[Deliver carrots and go to Honeybee Center -> 1.14 main]]

passages.cleanText: She hops off after thrusting the cradle of carrots into your arm, mumbling about how the younger generations are lazy and incapable.

passages.name: 1.14 main
passages.text: minigame starts [[1.15 main]]
passages.cleanText: minigame starts

passages.name: 1.15 main
passages.text: minigame ends [[1.16 main]]
passages.cleanText: minigame ends

passages.name: 1.12a main
passages.text: She hands you the carrots and hops off. [[Deliver carrots and go to Honeybee Center -> 1.14 main]]

links.linkText: Deliver carrots and go to Honeybee Center
links.original: [[Deliver carrots and go to Honeybee Center -> 1.14 main]]

passages.cleanText: She hands you the carrots and hops off.

passages.name: 1.16 main
passages.text: You've arrived Honeybee Center, Honey Haven's town square. [[1.17 main]]
passages.cleanText: You've arrived Honeybee Center, Honey Haven's town square.

passages.name: 1.17 main
passages.text: You enter the brick building and find Jane D, Mayor Barnaby's secretary. [[1.18 main]]
passages.cleanText: You enter the brick building and find Jane D, Mayor Barnaby's secretary.

passages.name: 1.18 main
passages.text: Hello Marty. You have some mail for me? [[1.19 main]]
passages.cleanText: Hello Marty. You have some mail for me?

passages.name: 1.19 main
passages.text: Sure do. Here's a letter for you... and here's 6 for the mayor. [[1.20 main]]
passages.cleanText: Sure do. Here's a letter for you... and here's 6 for the mayor.

passages.name: 1.20 main
passages.text:
Thanks. You'll be going to Barnaby's speech tonight, right? 
[["I guess..." -> 1.21a main]]
[["Yes!" -> 1.21b main]]
passages.cleanText: Thanks. You'll be going to Barnaby's speech tonight, right?

passages.name: 1.21a main
passages.text: Oh Marty. Quit joking with me, you might actually make me laugh. Barnaby can look a lil shifty, but he's not a bad mayor. [[1.22 main]]
passages.cleanText: Oh Marty. Quit joking with me, you might actually make me laugh. Barnaby can look a lil shifty, but he's not a bad mayor.

passages.name: 1.21b main
passages.text: Fantastic. Barnaby's a good mayor. [[1.22 main]]
passages.cleanText: Fantastic. Barnaby's a good mayor.

passages.name: 1.22 main
passages.text: He does what he needs to do. And that's what matters. [[1.23 main]]
passages.cleanText: He does what he needs to do. And that's what matters.

passages.name: 1.23 main
passages.text: You nod and start heading back home. On your commute, you realize there's one letter left. [[1.24 main]]
passages.cleanText: You nod and start heading back home. On your commute, you realize there's one letter left.

passages.name: 1.24 main
passages.text: Hm, what's this? [[1.25 main]]
passages.cleanText: Hm, what's this?

passages.name: 1.25 main
passages.text: You turn the letter over to find that there's no stamp or addressment. [[Open the letter -> 1.26 main]]
passages.cleanText: You turn the letter over to find that there's no stamp or addressment.

passages.name: 1.26 main
passages.text: The letter is blank except for one line: [[1.27 main]]
passages.cleanText: The letter is blank except for one line:

passages.name: 1.27 main
passages.text: cutscene for they're lying [[1.28 main]]
passages.cleanText: cutscene for they're lying

passages.name: 1.28 main
passages.text:
You blink and letter disappears from your forepaws like a passing dream. You no longer feel the weight of the paper on your palms. 
[["What the ****" -> 1.29 main]]
[["This day is making less and less sense" -> 1.29 main]]

links.linkText: "This day is making less and less sense"
links.original: [["This day is making less and less sense" -> 1.29 main]]

passages.cleanText: You blink and letter disappears from your forepaws like a passing dream. You no longer feel the weight of the paper on your palms.

passages.name: 1.29 main
passages.text: I should see Dr Muffins. [[1.30 main]]
passages.cleanText: I should see Dr Muffins.

passages.name: 1.30 main
passages.text: You meet Dr. Muffins at his private practice. [[1.31 main]]
passages.cleanText: You meet Dr. Muffins at his private practice.

passages.name: 1.31 main
passages.text: Hey there Marty! What brings you in today? [[1.32 main]]
passages.cleanText: Hey there Marty! What brings you in today?

passages.name: 1.32 main
passages.text: Doc.. I've been having really weird dreams... hallucinations too. [[1.33 main]]
passages.cleanText: Doc.. I've been having really weird dreams... hallucinations too.

passages.name: 1.33 main
passages.text: But the weirdest thing is that they all feel... so real. [[1.34 main]]
passages.cleanText: But the weirdest thing is that they all feel... so real.

passages.name: 1.34 main
passages.text:
There was a letter in my hand... it said 
[[Tell him -> 1.34a main]]
[[Don't tell him -> 1.34b main]]
passages.cleanText: There was a letter in my hand... it said

passages.name: 1.34a main
passages.text: It said "they're lying." I don't even know what it meant or who sent it. [[1.35 main]]
passages.cleanText: It said "they're lying." I don't even know what it meant or who sent it.

passages.name: 1.34b main
passages.text: Nevermind. But the weirdest thing was... [[1.35 main]]
passages.cleanText: Nevermind. But the weirdest thing was...

passages.name: 1.35 main
passages.text: It disappeared. It just felt like that wasn't real and it didn't happen for a second. [[1.36 main]]
passages.cleanText: It disappeared. It just felt like that wasn't real and it didn't happen for a second.

passages.name: 1.36 main
passages.text: That's terribly unfortunate. But let me assure you, those sights are //just// hallucinations. [[1.37 main]]
passages.cleanText: That's terribly unfortunate. But let me assure you, those sights are //just// hallucinations.

passages.name: 1.37 main
passages.text:
They aren't real, and you shouldn't believe they are. 
[["Why am I seeing them?" -> 1.38a main]]
[["Then what are they? -> 1.38b main]]
passages.cleanText: They aren't real, and you shouldn't believe they are.

passages.name: 1.38a main
passages.text: Well, you keep overworking yourself. [[1.39 main]]
passages.cleanText: Well, you keep overworking yourself.

passages.name: 1.38b main
passages.text: So curious today, aren't you? No need to worry, they're just blips in the brain since you're overworking yourself. [[1.39 main]]
passages.cleanText: So curious today, aren't you? No need to worry, they're just blips in the brain since you're overworking yourself.

passages.name: 1.39 main
passages.text: Here: my prescription is a cup of honey tea every morning. [[1.40 main]]
passages.cleanText: Here: my prescription is a cup of honey tea every morning.

passages.name: 1.40 main
passages.text: From the magical honey flower? Are those rare? [[1.41 main]]
passages.cleanText: From the magical honey flower? Are those rare?

passages.name: 1.41 main
passages.text: Rare everywhere but Honey Haven. Now, you must drink this everyday. [[1.42 main]]
passages.cleanText: Rare everywhere but Honey Haven. Now, you must drink this everyday.

passages.name: 1.42 main
passages.text: Do not stop drinking it and do not skip days. Trust me, you really don't want to keep seeing things. [[1.43 main]]
passages.cleanText: Do not stop drinking it and do not skip days. Trust me, you really don't want to keep seeing things.

passages.name: 1.43 main
passages.text: Oh um, thanks Dr. Muffins. [[1.44 main]]
passages.cleanText: Oh um, thanks Dr. Muffins.

passages.name: 1.44 main
passages.text: He hands you a pouch with dried honey flowers. He pushes a cup he just brewed towards you. [[1.45 main]]
passages.cleanText: He hands you a pouch with dried honey flowers. He pushes a cup he just brewed towards you.

passages.name: 1.45 main
passages.text: Oh and Marty? [[1.46 main]]
passages.cleanText: Oh and Marty?

passages.name: 1.46 main
passages.text: Yes? [[1.47 main]]
passages.cleanText: Yes?

passages.name: 1.47 main
passages.text:
Don't tell anyone about this. 
[[Drink the tea -> 1.48a main]]
[[Question Dr. Muffins -> 1.48b main]]
passages.cleanText: Don't tell anyone about this.

passages.name: 1.48 main
passages.text: You head back to Honeybee Center to hear Barnaby's speech. You only catch the tailwind of it since you're late. [[1.50 main]]
passages.cleanText: You head back to Honeybee Center to hear Barnaby's speech. You only catch the tailwind of it since you're late.

passages.name: 1.50 main
passages.text: I know you all are tired of hearing me talk, so I'll wrap this up quickly. [[1.51 main]]
passages.cleanText: I know you all are tired of hearing me talk, so I'll wrap this up quickly.

passages.name: 1.48b main
passages.text: Why? [[1.49b main]]
passages.cleanText: Why?

passages.name: 1.48a main
passages.text: You drink the honey tea from the mystical "honey flower" plant. It makes you feel a little loopy. [[1.49a main]]
passages.cleanText: You drink the honey tea from the mystical "honey flower" plant. It makes you feel a little loopy.

passages.name: 1.49a main
passages.text: I feel a little weird... [[1.50a main]]
passages.cleanText: I feel a little weird...

passages.name: 1.50a main
passages.text: For now. You'll feel better in no time. [[1.48 main]]
passages.cleanText: For now. You'll feel better in no time.

passages.name: 1.49b main
passages.text: It's a beautiful day, Marty. Don't ruin it with questions. I'll be on my way now. Drink your tea and rest up [[1.50b main]]
passages.cleanText: It's a beautiful day, Marty. Don't ruin it with questions. I'll be on my way now. Drink your tea and rest up

passages.name: 1.50b main
passages.text: You drink the tea brewed from the mystical "honey flower" plant. It makes you feel a little woozy. [[1.48 main]]
passages.cleanText: You drink the tea brewed from the mystical "honey flower" plant. It makes you feel a little woozy.

passages.name: 1.51 main
passages.text: Today is the celebration of Honey Haven's 44th anniversary! [[1.52 main]]
passages.cleanText: Today is the celebration of Honey Haven's 44th anniversary!

passages.name: 1.52 main
passages.text: Honey Haven is the world's first utopia-- a place that knows only kindness. [[1.53 main]]
passages.cleanText: Honey Haven is the world's first utopia-- a place that knows only kindness.

passages.name: 1.53 main
passages.text: It doesn't matter where you came from and what you've done. Now that you've chosen to be here, you are in paradise. [[1.54 main]]
passages.cleanText: It doesn't matter where you came from and what you've done. Now that you've chosen to be here, you are in paradise.

passages.name: 1.54 main
passages.text: Together we shall stand united as a community against anything or anyone who threatens our perfect picture of peace. Those are the only ones not welcomed here. [[1.55 main]]
passages.cleanText: Together we shall stand united as a community against anything or anyone who threatens our perfect picture of peace. Those are the only ones not welcomed here.

passages.name: 1.55 main
passages.text: Stand strong, Honey Haven! [[1.56 main]]
passages.cleanText: Stand strong, Honey Haven!

passages.name: 1.56 main
passages.text: The crowd erupts in cheers. You feel immense pride in your home. [[1.57 main]]
passages.cleanText: The crowd erupts in cheers. You feel immense pride in your home.

passages.name: 1.57 main
passages.text: You eat dinner with a few neighbors and then head home. After tucking yourself into bed, you look at the sky. [[1.58 main]]
passages.cleanText: You eat dinner with a few neighbors and then head home. After tucking yourself into bed, you look at the sky.

passages.name: 1.58 main
passages.text: Wow... the stars are so beautiful tonight. [[1.59 main]]
passages.cleanText: Wow... the stars are so beautiful tonight.

passages.name: 1.59 main
passages.text: I hope things... hoaah.. stay like this forev.... [[1.60 main]]
passages.cleanText: I hope things... hoaah.. stay like this forev....

passages.name: 1.60 main
passages.text: zzzz.... zzzzzzzzz... [[1.61 main]]
passages.cleanText: zzzz.... zzzzzzzzz...

passages.name: 1.61 main
passages.text: Goodnight!
passages.cleanText: Goodnight!

passages.text: Day 1 Starts [[1.1.1]]
passages.cleanText: Day 1 Starts

passages.text: You ever feel like you're in a dream so real [[1.1.2]]
passages.cleanText: You ever feel like you're in a dream so real

passages.text: that you think it is? [[1.1.3]]
passages.cleanText: that you think it is?

passages.text: When that's the case, do you want to wake up? [[1.1.4]]
passages.cleanText: When that's the case, do you want to wake up?

passages.text: Too bad, you don't get a choice. [[1.1]]
passages.cleanText: Too bad, you don't get a choice.

passages.name: 1.12a.1 casserole
passages.text: Oh thank the GOAT that it's just you, Marty. [[1.13a casserole]]
passages.cleanText: Oh thank the GOAT that it's just you, Marty.
